methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $22M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Transportation (found 1 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 5 same-sector peers exist in Transportation, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: REGENT Craft
private.rationale: Same sector (Transportation), same stage (Series A), post-money $270M

data.narrative:
Pipedream is a Series A transportation company founded by Garrett McCurrach and Canon Reeves that has raised $22.4M to date. The transportation sector comprises eight private comparables, including peers such as REGENT Craft, Rivian, Einride, The Boring Company, and Harbinger; no public transportation benchmarks are available for direct comparison.

Stage-progression methodology is the applicable valuation approach, given insufficient depth in same-stage and adjacent-stage peer data to support a median-based triangulation. Applying a 2.0x step-up multiplier to the $22.4M raised proxy—a standard Series A-to-next-stage increment—yields an implied valuation of $45M. This method reflects typical capital step-ups observed at growth inflection between Series A and subsequent rounds.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $38M to $52M, centered on $45M, derived from sensitivity around the stage-progression step-up multiplier. Key uncertainties include: the absence of narrow-set peer comparables (fewer than three same-stage Transportation peers at similar valuation tiers), which limits cross-validation; unit economics and revenue scale relative to the broader sector peer set; and the applicability of the 2.0x step-up assumption to this specific company's capital efficiency. A more refined range would require either additional same-stage peer data or disclosure of Pipedream's revenue and growth metrics relative to Transportation sector benchmarks.
